title: Nature's Aura Render Fix
description: Fixes a Nature's Aura bug where backface culling breaks when Nature's Aura particles and Oculus are present.
body: Fixes [a Nature's Aura bug](https://github.com/Ellpeck/NaturesAura/issues/383) where backface culling breaks when Nature's Aura particles and Oculus are present. Per Ellpeck, the dev of Nature's Aura: ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_ecd00b6e-dd70-4810-abfc-da0c0b3f9296.png) This mod fixes that.
